What We Help Review

Asset recovery services with a clean, professional intake process.

This site is set up to explain the service, collect client intake details, show the document checklist, and provide agreement language in one place.

🏛️

Unclaimed Funds

Potential funds held by agencies, financial institutions, banks, settlements, or public offices.

🔎

Asset Research

Reviewing possible forgotten assets connected to a person, estate, family, address, or prior records.

🛡️

Confidential Intake

A professional first step to gather basic details and understand what the client needs.

🤝

Guided Recovery

Clear next steps for documents, claim requirements, and recovery process guidance.

How It Works

Four simple steps from inquiry to next step.

No confusion. No pressure. Just a professional review process.

1

Submit Intake

Client provides basic contact and claim information.

2

Preliminary Review

We review the information to determine what type of asset search may apply.

3

Documents

Client receives a checklist of documents that may be needed.

4

Recovery Guidance

We explain next steps and help guide the process professionally.

Client Intake

Start your asset review.

Complete this intake section so Sanchez Asset Recovery Group can understand your situation and contact you directly.

Before You Submit

Do not submit Social Security numbers through this form.
Do not upload sensitive documents on this page.
Use this intake to request a call back and begin the review.
For urgent questions, call or text 917-394-3945.

Request a Call Back

This inquiry form opens your email app to send the message. For a stronger automatic form later, connect Formspree, Google Forms, or a CRM.

Document Checklist

Documents that may be requested later.

The exact documents depend on the type of claim, agency, institution, and recovery process.

Identity

Valid photo ID, current contact information, and proof of current address may be needed.

Ownership / Relationship

Proof of relationship, estate documents, authorization, or other supporting paperwork may be required.

Claim Support

Prior addresses, account information, notices, checks, letters, or agency correspondence may help support the review.

Recovery Agreement Preview

Client authorization and recovery agreement section.

This is a website-ready agreement preview. Have a qualified professional review final legal language before using it as a binding contract.

Sanchez Asset Recovery Group — Asset Recovery Authorization

Client: ________________________________

Phone: ________________________________

Email: ________________________________

The client authorizes Sanchez Asset Recovery Group to review information provided by the client for the purpose of identifying potential unclaimed funds, forgotten assets, insurance proceeds, estate-related property, refunds, or other recoverable assets.

  • Submitting information does not guarantee funds or assets will be found or recovered.
  • Any recovery fee, if applicable, should be disclosed clearly before services are performed.
  • Client agrees to provide truthful information and requested documentation when needed.
  • Sanchez Asset Recovery Group will handle client communications professionally and confidentially.

Client Signature

Date: ____________

Representative Signature

Date: ____________

Website notice: This section is informational and should be reviewed before use as a final enforceable agreement.

FAQ

Common questions.

Do you guarantee recovery?

No. No recovery can be guaranteed. The review helps determine whether there may be a potential claim or next step.

Is this a government agency?

No. Sanchez Asset Recovery Group is an independent asset recovery assistance service.

What does the intake do?

It helps collect basic contact information and the type of asset issue you need help reviewing.

How can I contact you fast?

Call or text 917-394-3945.
